details.headline: # Field Details
details.label:
### Label
{0}
details.checkbox_required_not_available:
The “required” option is not available for a single checkbox. However, you can easily work around this limitation. Simply use a Checkbox Group with one option and enable the “required” setting. This way, users must select the option before continuing—effectively creating a required checkbox.

$bulb$ Follow [this tutorial](https://discord.com/channels/913969068904677426/1490426732199678252) to learn how to set up a Checkbox Group.
